errors.firstTime: You must go to the onboarding process first. Try again after you finish it.

overTheAir.success: Update installed successfully! Please restart the app to apply the update.

errorsByCode.NO_SERVICE: The dApp is trying to connect to a different blockchain or network than the one selected.
